text: Aaj khane par babuji ne announce kar diya ki hum gaon wali pushtaini zameen bech rahe hain, mujhse ek baar poocha tak nahi. Jab maine thoda oppose kiya toh mummy rone lagi aur kehne lagi ki meri zidd unhe shamshaan pahuncha degi aur 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai'. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur kuch samajh nahi aa raha ki is umar mein saans kaise loon.

Bina mujhse salah liye babuji ne mere bete ka rishta tay kar diya hai kyunki unhe 'izzat' bachani hai. Mummy baar-baar bol rahi hain ki meri wajah se ghar mein kalesh ho raha hai aur unka BP meri wajah se hi badh raha hai. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main office ka ek kaam nahi kar pa raha, bas siskiyaan nikal rahi hain.

Babuji ne aaj announce kiya ki meri saari savings ab chacha ji ke bete ki business loss ko cover karengi. Mummy ne seene pe haath rakh kar bol diya ki meri 'matlabi' fitrat unhe maar dalegi aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai, itni zyada flood of emotions hai ki main agli mahine ki EMI ke baare mein soch bhi nahi pa raha.

Aaj subah babuji ne decide kiya ki meri beti ki padhai ruk jayegi kyunki 'log kya kahenge' agar wo shehar gayi. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz babuji ki jhidkiyan sunni padti hain aur unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai. Mujhe itna gussa aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai.

Bina meri marzi ke babuji ne ghar ka renovation shuru karwa diya aur saara bojh meri salary par daal diya. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur agar maine paise nahi diye toh wo zeher kha lengi kyunki unka sar samaj mein neecha ho gaya hai. Main poori tarah se toot gaya hoon, bas rona hi nikal raha hai aur future bilkul andhera lag raha hai.
